leadership_style: Lead through systems thinking and demonstrated outcomes. I build clarity by making architecture explicit — when the structure of a system is visible, decisions become easier for everyone on the team, technical or not.
leadership_strengths: Making complex system decisions legible to non-technical stakeholders
Driving toward measurable outcomes rather than process theater
High accountability for end-to-end system quality, not just individual components
Designing processes that other people can follow and extend — not just solutions that work once
leadership_development_goals: Building influence in consulting contexts without formal authority
Managing stakeholder expectations across multiple organizational levels
Developing delegation instincts for systems work — knowing when to hand off vs. stay hands-on
